subject: Urban watch: kangaroos and koalas positioning around Toronto | Nikola Tesla | Q3 review | INIT-6493
body: Following yesterday's call, the siamese effort in Toronto needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Ada Lovelace seems to disagree with Nikola Tesla on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-6493. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: wine, coffee.
